        for j in range(cnt):

    return np.array(pts[:n]), np.full(n, r*0.97)

        (0.1012,[6,5,6,5,4],[0,1,0,1,0]),

    ii, jj = np.triu_indices(n, 1)

    wall_gap = np.minimum(np.minimum(centers[:,0]-radii, 1-centers[:,0]-radii),
                          np.minimum(centers[:,1]-radii, 1-centers[:,1]-radii))
    # Identify loose circles
    min_pair_gap = np.full(n, np.inf)
    for k in range(len(ii)):
        if gap[k] < min_pair_gap[ii[k]]: min_pair_gap[ii[k]] = gap[k]
        if gap[k] < min_pair_gap[jj[k]]: min_pair_gap[jj[k]] = gap[k]
